createByLink.title: Create Quiz with AI
createByLink.tokensAvailable: You have {{count}} tokens available. Each custom quiz costs 1 token.
createByLink.questionCountRecommendation: We recommend 10-20 questions for an ideal study session.
createByLink.invalidLink: Please enter a valid LinkedIn or job platform link.
createByLink.notEnoughTokens: You don't have enough tokens. Each custom quiz costs 1 token.
createByLink.successGenerated: Quiz generated successfully! 1 token was deducted.
createByLink.errorGenerating: Error generating quiz. Please try again.
createByLink.customDescriptionPlaceholder: Describe the objective and content of this quiz...
createByLink.customContextPlaceholder: Paste text, articles or documentation for the AI to use as a base...
createByLink.subtitle: Create a personalized quiz by job posting or custom topic.
createByLink.chooseHow: Choose how to create your quiz
createByLink.jobQuizDesc: Paste a job link and receive a personalized quiz based on the requirements.
createByLink.themeQuizDesc: Set the topic, difficulty level, and number of questions for your quiz.
createByLink.pasteJobLink: Paste the job link and the platform will be detected automatically
createByLink.customQuizDescription: Set the topic, difficulty level, and context for your custom quiz.
createByLink.featureInstantDesc: Paste the link and get a personalized quiz in seconds, focused on the required skills.
createByLink.featureRelevantDesc: Questions generated based on exactly what the job requires, boosting your chances.
createByLink.featureEvolutionDesc: Track your performance and identify areas for improvement before the real interview.
createByLink.tagPlaceholder: Type a tag and press Enter
createByLink.readyToGenerateDesc: Your configuration is complete. The AI will analyze your preferences and create a unique challenge for you.

generated.dailyLimitReached: You've reached the daily limit of 3 free quizzes. Wait until tomorrow or buy tokens to keep playing.
generated.errorCheckingLimit: Error checking quiz limit. Please try again.
generated.scoreDescription: You got {{correct}} out of {{total}} questions correct.
generated.errorRestarting: Error restarting quiz. Please try again.

freeQuizzes.title: Free Quizzes
freeQuizzes.subtitle: Practice without spending tokens
freeQuizzes.earnTokensDesc: Earn 1 token for every 5 free quizzes completed!
freeQuizzes.remainingQuizzes_one: You can take {{count}} more free quiz today.
freeQuizzes.remainingQuizzes_other: You can take {{count}} more free quizzes today.
freeQuizzes.adjustFilters: Try adjusting the filters or your search.
freeQuizzes.helpText: The quizzes on this page are free, created by the community, and don't use your tokens! They are great for warm-up. To train for a specific job (e.g.: "React Developer at Google"), use the Create Quiz tool with the job description.
freeQuizzes.loginRequired: Log in to play free quizzes! 🚀
freeQuizzes.quizNotAvailable: This quiz is not available or has no questions.
freeQuizzes.tooManyRequests: Too many requests! Please wait a moment.
freeQuizzes.rewardEarned: 🎉 Congratulations! You earned 1 token for completing 5 free quizzes!

myQuizzes.title: My Quizzes
myQuizzes.subtitle: Manage your personalized study library.
myQuizzes.emptyState: You haven't created any quizzes yet.
myQuizzes.emptyStateDescription: You haven't created any quizzes yet. Try creating a personalized quiz based on a real job posting and boost your chances of success.
myQuizzes.quizNotAvailable: This quiz is not available or has no questions.
myQuizzes.helpText: Here you'll find all quizzes generated from job posting analysis. You can retake them as many times as you want to improve your score and reinforce your knowledge. They don't expire and your attempt history is saved for reference.

history.subtitle: Your learning history and performance.
history.noActivityDescription: You haven't taken any quizzes yet. Start now to see your progress!
